summary: Drafted the L1 prototype pipeline activation proposal. It defines a runnable prototype as a locally viewable artifact served over localhost, keeps the first builder local_tool-only, and queues Gate M, Phase 9, and Gate N before any real provider or deploy work.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate M review. Do not implement the prototype pipeline until Gate M confirms local_tool-only scope and the runnable artifact definition.
notes: The first L1 pipeline validates product semantics without real AI provider calls.
Markdown-only or JSON-only output is explicitly not a prototype.
